# Schema changelog

The veld memory record schema is versioned. Every schema change is recorded
here with date, diff, and migration prose.

| Version | Date | Summary |
|---|---|---|
| (pre-v1) | — | Pre-schema-version era. All records default to `schema_version: 0`. |

## Upcoming

**v1 — LLM-Wiki Phase 1** (not yet landed; see
[decision 0002](../decisions/0002-llm-wiki-dual-pathway.md)):

- Adds `cited_sources: Vec<SourceCitation>` to `Memory`
- Adds `is_derived: bool` to `Memory`
- Adds `schema_version: u32` to `Memory`
- Adds `page_type: PageType` derived from `RecordKind` + tags
- Existing records auto-migrate with default values; backwards-compatible
  via `#[serde(default)]`

The generator that will own this page once it lands:
[`docs/generators/src/bin/gen-schema-changelog.rs`](https://github.com/Portll/veld/blob/main/docs/generators/) (not yet implemented).
